reviews.review_description: Says there’s an internet connection issue please try again. It’s not the internet it’s the app not allowing us in the room! Please fix bug!
Oculus continuously ends support for apps leaving us left with what is essentially a paperweight. its the case with many apps. not sure if this is to force people to buy new headsets
I love it, only thing that could make it better is if I could design a whole house.
Bring back oculus rooms
I would leave a 5 star but this game crashes my oculus and I need to reset it to play on my oculus again
If you can contact me that would be a big help. It always says cannot connect even though I have full bars.
Enjoyed the room needs more games in the rooms

reviews.review_title: My Go To Hang Out Place
reviews.review_description: My friends and I love hanging out here.  Perfect if you know people far away and want to get together.
My Wi-Fi is 100% I can do anything on the oculus go except get into my own oculus room. I paid $250 for this device and can’t even play a game with my next-door neighbor.
It says it offers a furniture choice but it doesn’t. I would like room options and not limited to this one.
Amazing

reviews.review_title: It's cool but could use improvement.
reviews.review_description: I like the customization of the room and the games are fun to play either alone or with someone. ( I assume they'll add more) Also this is one of the only apps I found were your having a private party with someone instead of complete strangers dropping in. I don't like that you cant watch Netflix or Sling with a friend. The hole reason I bought the Oculus Go was to play games and watch Netflix with my brother who lives in another state, and so far there's no option to do so on the Oculus Go.  You can Rent or buy movies in Oculus Rooms, however with only a 2 hour battery life I'm not purchasing a movie and I'll rarely rent one if I ever do at all. Add more streaming services and I'll give it a higher rating.

It is great to be able to invite someone to your room, but it needs more options once you are there. We can't access Oculus videos or venues, much less Netflix, Hulu or Pluto TV. Spotify should also be an option.
I recently got an Oculus Go and I was ready to enjoy one of the best apps out there... And you turn it down!! It's insane to turn down an app until you release a new "replacement" platform.

reviews.review_title: Good Idea. But Needs More Freedom
reviews.review_description: This app is one I tell people to download it is Awesome app. I like how you can upload any of your photos from your linked Facebook account on the walls. My friends and I have spent hours in this app just playing the board games and the 100's of streaming radio stations. About the only 2 things I could say bad about it is the video side of things. It really sux how limited you are on what can be played. Why only videos from Facebook. Why not have the option to play videos from the Phone or Youtube. The number of people I know that just use Gear VR to play youtube videos is a lot and it's people like that this app needs to become what it can be. I see a really good thing here I just hope they give more options for us users for our rooms. The other thing is it would be nice to add multiplayer app's that's not listed in the App launcher also it would be a nice to see what others have installed who are in the room. I give it 5 stars used on Samsung Gear VR S7

reviews.review_title: Why is this page still here!!
reviews.review_description: I just got a Go specifically to use Rooms while in corona lockdown, only to find it’s been removed. No indication of that here or on the website - I will be returning my Go tomorrow
Can’t wait to see what the future holds for Oculus Rooms. I love this application !
BRING IT BACK! Reading up on future app, Go is not included.
This is only of use if you want to 'hang out' with people in virtuality. Unless your actual friends have a headset too it's pretty useless.

We enjoy the game table and were pleasantly surprised by the new Monopoly game. The cards automatically dropping down were an annoyance. The board looks great but seemed to cause both of our headsets to give heat warnings. Maybe it needs a few tweets. All in all a fun diversion.
